bead.title: registry: runtime plugin lookup precedence (project → global → baked-in)
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 5 of epic ddx-602ae31a)
Plugin content can live in two tiers — per-project (ddxroot.Path()/plugins/<name>) and machine-wide global (${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>). Runtime resolution must deterministically prefer the project copy when present, fall back to the global copy, and finally to the baked-in default (ddx plugin only). Without a single authoritative resolver, install/update/init/doctor each reinvent path logic and drift.

ROOT CAUSE
- internal/registry/resolve.go:29 `ResolvePlugin(ctx, projectRoot, name)` is the precedence resolver: project path computed at resolve.go:30, global at resolve.go:35, baked-in fallback at resolve.go:44. It must be the only place precedence is decided and must be covered by named tests so install/init/doctor can rely on it.
- internal/registry/resolve.go:15 `GlobalPluginDir(name)` returns ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name> via ddxroot.GlobalDir(); the project path routes through ddxroot.Path() (in-tree vs convention mode handled there).

PROPOSED FIX
1. Ensure `ResolvePlugin` returns (path, layer, err) with layer ∈ {project, global, baked-in} and the exact precedence project → global → baked-in.
2. Add table-driven tests in internal/registry/resolve_test.go pinning both the prefers-project and falls-back-to-global behaviors against a temp HOME/XDG fixture.
3. Do not alter install/update/init/doctor call sites here beyond confirming they call `ResolvePlugin` (those are covered by sibling children).

NON-SCOPE
- Removing the per-project install tier (both tiers coexist).
- Migrating ~/.config/ddx/ legacy paths.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.
- install/update/init/doctor wiring (sibling children).

DEPS
ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution) — ResolvePlugin routes through both ddxroot.Path() and ddxroot.GlobalDir(); both must be agreed-on before this lands.

GOVERNING ARTIFACTS
- docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md (precedence decision record).
- CLAUDE.md "Persona System" three-layer precedence note.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestPluginLookup_PrefersProjectOverGlobal (internal/registry/resolve_test.go) asserts that when both the project plugin dir and the global plugin dir contain <name>, ResolvePlugin returns the project path with layer=="project".
2. TestPluginLookup_FallsBackToGlobal (internal/registry/resolve_test.go) asserts that when the project copy is absent but the global copy exists, ResolvePlugin returns the global path with layer=="global".
3. Both tests use an isolated temp HOME/XDG fixture and do not touch the real user home.
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/registry/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
